overall.description: First-person exploration through a detailed steampunk-inspired coastal city featuring Victorian stone architecture, elevated walkways, and a bustling fish market. The player moves from a sunny waterfront promenade through narrow streets and alleys, passing various NPCs and environmental details in a high-quality game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny waterfront promenade with a stone retaining wall and wooden stairs on the left. The camera moves forward along a red carpet path, passing an ornate lamppost and a large beached wooden hull structure. An NPC in a vest runs toward the camera from the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto an elevated concrete walkway with tram tracks, passing between a stone cliff on the left and buildings on the right. The path leads under a large metal arch truss structure toward a tall brick building in the distance. An NPC is seen leaning on a balcony railing to the right.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed track, the scene opens into a sunlit market plaza with various stalls and workers. The camera passes a worker sweeping on the left and approaches a fishmonger stall on the right, where large fish carcasses hang from hooks and a vendor is cleaning them. The tall brick building from the previous segment is now visible to the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the market square and enters a narrow, shadowed alleyway between tall stone buildings. Overhead footbridges and scaffolding crisscross above the path, which continues into a darker tunnel-like passage ahead. The lighting shifts to diffused shadows as the buildings block the direct sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the shadowed depths of a narrow urban alleyway. It begins along a red carpet path beside a stone retaining wall, passing an ornate lamppost and a beached wooden hull as an NPC runs toward the viewer. The camera then ascends onto an elevated concrete walkway with tram tracks, gliding between a stone cliff and buildings under a large metal arch truss. As the path exits the enclosed track, the scene opens into a sunlit market plaza filled with stalls and workers, passing a fishmonger with hanging carcasses before the view shifts toward a tall brick building. Finally, the camera leaves the bright square and enters a narrow, shadowed alleyway where overhead footbridges and scaffolding block the sun, leading the viewer into a dark, tunnel-like passage.
